title: Bump compiler submodule for corelib-quality CI fix

source.subject: chore(compiler): bump submodule for corelib-quality CI fix

body:
Bumps the compiler submodule after a corelib-quality CI fix so superrepo main runs tests against the corrected analysis/prelude path.

- **Completed:** 2026-05-24
